chunks.text:
78Fence — Fence installation and repair in Dallas. Services:
- Wood fence installation
- Iron fencing
- Chain link fencing
- Fence repair
- Gate installation

Contact Information:

- Email: robert@78fence. com
- Address: 2433 N Buckner Blvd, Dallas, TX 75228
- Website: http://www. 78fence. com/
- Service Area: Dallas, TX and surrounding areas

Rating: 5 stars with 10 reviews.
